entries.preview: Test directory structure: tests/ root, tests/unit/ for ztest unit tests on native_sim with mock HAL
entries.content:
Test directory layout:
- tests/ is the root for all tests
- tests/unit/ contains unit tests using ztest on native_sim
- tests/unit/CMakeLists.txt is a standalone Zephyr project including ../../include and ../../src
- tests/unit/prj.conf enables CONFIG_ZTEST=y and CONFIG_LOG=y
- tests/unit/testcase.yaml defines twister metadata (platforms: native_sim, nrf7002dk/nrf5340/cpuapp; harness: ztest)
- Tests construct their own hal_iface_t with mock function pointers -- never link hw_init.c
- Run tests: west twister -T tests/unit -p native_sim

entries.preview: NCS toolchain path is /opt/nordic/ncs/v3.2.3, must source zephyr-env.sh before west commands
entries.content:
The NCS SDK is installed at /opt/nordic/ncs/v3.2.3 (not /opt/nordic/ncs). Before running west commands, the Zephyr environment must be sourced:

source /opt/nordic/ncs/v3.2.3/zephyr/zephyr-env.sh

Without this, west reports "unknown command" errors. The user cannot run native_sim tests on their macOS machine but native_sim should remain a supported platform for other environments.

entries.preview: Use --runner jlink for flashing; nrfutil is not installed. VCOM1 (port ending 913) is the UART console.
entries.content:
Flashing on this machine requires `west flash --runner jlink` because nrfutil is not installed (and its `device` subcommand is missing).

Serial ports on the nRF7002 DK:
- /dev/cu.usbmodem0010507765911 -- VCOM0 (not the app console)
- /dev/cu.usbmodem0010507765913 -- VCOM1 (UART console, ztest output appears here)

JLink reset via `echo -e "r\ng\nexit\n" | JLinkExe -device nRF5340_xxAA_APP -if SWD -speed 4000 -autoconnect 1` works but causes USB CDC ports to briefly drop, making it tricky to capture boot output. Best to connect serial first, then reset separately, then read history.

On-device test workflow:
1. west build -b nrf7002dk/nrf5340/cpuapp -p always tests/unit
2. west flash --runner jlink
3. Monitor VCOM1 for ztest output
